description: Create three custom order statuses in Magento to support a specific fulfillment workflow. Configure the status 'quality_check' (Label: 'Quality Inspection') assigned to the 'Processing' state and visible on the storefront. Configure 'ready_pickup' (Label: 'Ready for Pickup') assigned to the 'Complete' state and visible on the storefront. Configure 'supplier_delay' (Label: 'Awaiting Supplier') assigned to the 'On Hold' state and hidden from the storefront. Ensure none of these are set as the default status for their assigned states.
